evaluations.summary: The review loop defines rounds, but it does not require unresolved findings to be carried forward and explicitly addressed by ID in subsequent rounds.
evaluations.evidence_location: Artifact markdown <steps> section, step 4 "Execute live board review"; Artifact contract JSON role_requirements.steps[3]
evaluations.why_it_matters: ARB-011 applies to the board revision loop and fix items map. This artifact describes iterative review rounds, but it never requires conceptual-group tracking, explicit reference to prior unresolved findings by ID, or a fix-items map that records each carried-forward item as accepted or rejected. Without that closure chain, the same issue can recur across rounds under different wording, which blocks convergence and weakens governance traceability.

notes: No explicit carried-forward finding ID mechanism or fix-items-map requirement appears in the supplied artifact or contract.
